Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Shepherd (The Elder Empire: Shadow)]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 1''' — Shepherds wear black.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — A Shepherd is a type of entity or person.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — The team includes thirty-three Shepherds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 11''' — Shepherds engage in combat on ledges.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — Shepherds are trained in concealment.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — A Shepherd was killed by a girl in a Blackwatch coat.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — A Shepherd was found crumpled in black on the wall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 15''' — Shepherds act as lookouts and guards.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 15''' — A third person was identified as a Shepherd.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 17''' — Shepherds are a group that includes one of the people who lunged for Shera's ball.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — A Shepherd handed Shera a captain’s horn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 26''' — Shera borrowed a gun from a Shepherd.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
